testcase.name: test_translate_blocks_batch_respects_stop_flag

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected stop_flag to halt early; all 3 succeeded but should be fewer assert 3 < 3 + where 3 = len(['sentence one', 'sentence two', 'sentence three'])

testcase.failure: tests/test_sentence_mode_consistency.py:175: in test_translate_blocks_batch_respects_stop_flag assert processed < len(texts), ( E AssertionError: Expected stop_flag to halt early; all 3 succeeded but should be fewer E assert 3 < 3 E + where 3 = len(['sentence one', 'sentence two', 'sentence three'])
